issue: compare and create the PR to match juzar/ai-os to local project
solution:
# ANALYSIS

## 1. WHAT THIS PROJECT/SYSTEM IS

AI-OS V4 - AI-powered DevOps automation platform with multi-model LLM support, Kubernetes diagnostics, GitHub PR review, memory/context management, and CLI interface.

---

## 2. KEY COMPONENTS

| Component | Purpose |
|-----------|---------|
| `ai/main.py` | CLI entry point (devops, incident, kube, perplexity modes) |
| `ai/executor.py` | LLM calls (Claude, OpenAI) + prompt routing |
| `ai/agents/` | Infrastructure connectors (K8s, Azure, AWS, GitHub, web) |
| `ai/memory.py` | Persistent context storage |
| `ai/remediation.py` | Auto-fix execution |
| `sessions/` | Active session state |
| `memory_store/` | Historical memory snapshots |
| `.env` | API keys (OpenAI, Anthropic, GitHub) |

---

## 3. ISSUES / RISKS

| Issue | Severity | Details |
|-------|----------|---------|
| **Shell injection vulnerability** | CRITICAL | `subprocess.run(cmd, shell=True)` in `kubernetes.py`, `infra.py`, `executor.py` - user input flows directly to shell |
| **API keys in .env (local)** | HIGH | No .gitignore reference; risk of credential exposure in commits |
| **No input validation** | HIGH | CLI args passed unsanitized to subprocess commands |
| **Hardcoded models** | MEDIUM | Model versions pinned; no fallback mechanism |
| **Token limits** | MEDIUM | Max 600
